rows.title: 5 in.- 6 in. Grinder with Trigger Grip
rows.description: Complete grinding applications with the 5 in.- 6 in. Grinder with Trigger Grip. Engineered for high performance and safe usage, this tool delivers long life and productivity on tough jobsites.
features: Dust Ejection System provides durability by ejecting damaging dust and debris particles that enter the tool through the air intake vents

rows.title: 5"/6" High Performance Grinder With No Lock On Trigger Grip
rows.description: The D28065 5" / 6" High Performance Grinder w/ No Lock on Trigger Grip is powered by a 13 Amp motor and equipped with the Dust Ejection System technology designed to protect the tool from damaging dust and debris that enters through air intake vents. Features the Quick-Change wheel release, which enables users to release the wheel tool-free.
features: 13 amp/2.3HP, 9,000 rpm DEWALT built G55 (AC/DC) motor designed for faster material removal and higher overload protection

rows.title: 5 in. - 6 in. Rat Tail SAG, No Lock-on, With Lock-Off (Two Stage Trigger) (13 Amp)
rows.description: Complete a variety of grinding applications with the 5 in - 6 in. Small Angle Grinder. Powered by a 13.0 Amp motor, this grinder delivers 9,000 rpm. Designed for durability and long life, Dust Ejection System technology ejects damaging dust and debris particles that enter the tool.
features: 13.0 Amp/2.3HP, 9,000 rpm DEWALT built G55 (AC/DC) motor designed for faster material removal and higher overload protection

rows.title: 4-1/2 in. (115 mm) - 5 in. (127 mm) Paddle Switch Grinder
rows.description: Complete a wide range of grinding applications with this 4-1/2 in. (115 mm) - 5 in. (127 mm) Paddle Switch Grinder. Featuring a powerful brushless motor and E-CLUTCH technology, this high-performance tool delivers long life in tough conditions.
features: 13.0 amp/2.3HP, 11,000 rpm DEWALT built G55 (AC) motor designed for faster material removal and higher overload protection
includes: (1) 5 in. T27 Tool Free Adjustable Guard

rows.title: 4-1/2 in. - 5 in. Grinder with Trigger Grip
rows.description: Complete grinding applications with the 4-1/2 in. - 5 in. Grinder with Trigger Grip. Engineered for high performance and safe usage, this tool delivers long life and productivity on tough jobsites.
features: 13.0 amp/2.3HP, 9,000 rpm DEWALT built G55 (AC/DC) motor designed for faster material removal and higher overload protection

rows.title: 4-1/2 in. (115 mm) - 5 in. (125 mm) Grinder with Slide Switch
rows.description: Complete a wide range of grinding applications with the 4-1/2 in. (115 mm) - 5 in. (125 mm) Grinder with Slide Switch. Powered by a 13 Amp motor and equipped with the Dust Ejection System technology that's designed to help protect the tool in tough conditions, this high-performance grinder gets the job done.
features: 13.0 amp/2.3HP, 11,000 rpm DEWALT built G55 (AC) motor designed for faster material removal and higher overload protection

rows.title: 5 in. (125 mm)/6 in. (150 mm) Cut-Off/Grinder with Slide Switch

rows.title: ATOMIC 20V MAX* 4" Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
rows.description: Complete high-powered applications in tight spaces with the ATOMIC 20V MAX* 4 in. Angle Grinder (battery and charger sold separately) that delivers optimized maneuverability and 755 MWO. This tool is equipped with the DEWALT ANTI-ROTATION System to help maximize control. This feature quickly stops the wheel when a pinch, stall, or bind-up event is sensed, reducing reactionary torque. An ergonomic design allows access to ultra tight spaces, while the clip-on guard can quickly convert a Type B guard into a Type A guard. Replace pneumatic angle grinders with this cordless solution that delivers untethered performance, productivity, and pneumatic-like power†.
features: DEWALT's First Cordless 4 In. Angle Grinder - Get cordless convenience and unprecedented performance from our first cordless 4 in. angle grinder compatible with standard 4 in. x 3/8 in. and 4 in. x 5/8 in. accessories (sold separately).

Help Maximize Control - Equipped with the DEWALT ANTI-ROTATION System. This feature quickly stops the wheel when a pinch, stall, or bind-up event is sensed, reducing reactionary torque. The switch needs to be cycled (turned on and off) to restart the tool.
Electronic Brake - Help maintain control with the electronic brake designed to stop the wheel within 1.15 seconds** after the on/off trigger is released.
additional_features: Ergonomic Design - Complete applications with a slim, ergonomic design that's 13% lighter than a competitive pneumatic angle grinder in use†† for access into ultra tight spaces without sacrificing power.
Fast Guard Changes - Quickly convert your standard Type B guard into a Type A guard with a clip on guard.
Up To 44% More Power Than 0.7 HP Rated Pneumatic Angle Grinders† - Work fast and help optimize productivity.
Easy Wheel Changes - Change wheels quickly with the spindle lock that removes the need for multiple wrenches.
Brushless Motor Performance - Take on demanding applications with 755 MWO and 12,500 (no load) RPM.
Paddle Switch - Replicate the power performance of 0.7 HP rated pneumatic angle grinders with this 4 in. angle grinder that has a lock off paddle and no-lock on features.
Forward Exhaust System - Direct air away from the user with an exhaust system that helps prevent overheating from the motor.
Reversible Flange - Accommodates Ø3/8 and Ø5/8 arbor size non-hubbed accessories.
TOOL CONNECT CHIP READY - Pair the TOOL CONNECT Chip (sold separately) and DEWALT TOOL CONNECT app‡‡ for data on jobsite asset management and tool location.
Where Size Meets Power - ATOMIC power tools are part of the expanding DEWALT 20V MAX* system, offering size without compromise.
includes: (1) DCG400 ATOMIC 20V MAX* 4 in. Angle Grinder
(1) Type B Guard with Type A Clip-on Guard
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
**On average using 1/16" T1 DW8716 wheel.
†Based on MWO using DCBP320 battery (sold separately)

††Measured with DCBP320 battery (sold separately) vs. PATCO GAL-1340-1 with 4" of connected 1/2" diameter hose and equal accessories. PATCO is a trademark of Patco Air Tools, Inc., which has not endorsed, approved, or sponsored this comparison.
‡Additional subscription charge and third-party data charges may apply.

rows.title: 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 4 1/2 in. Slide-Switch Grinder (Tool Only)
rows.description: Complete grinding applications with the 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 4.5 in. Slide-Switch Grinder that maintains constant speed under load. Equipped with overload protection and an efficient brushless motor, this cordless tool accommodates 4.5 in. wheels and includes both a Type B guard for grinding and a Clip-On Guard to convert the Type B guard for cutting operations. Designed for versatility and durability, this grinder features mesh screens that help prevent debris that can cause damage from entering internal components. Offering slide-switch operation for continual use, the 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 4.5 in. Slide-Switch Grinder is ideal for tough days on the job. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Run Time - Up to 56 cuts of 1/2" rebar**
Perform & Protect - This grinder is equipped with ANTI-ROTATION features including a Kickback Brake and E-Clutch.
Powerful Performance - Take on tough jobs with a brushless motor engineered to deliver up to 850 MWO and up to 9,000 RPM (no load).
additional_features: Slide-Switch Operation - Operate grinder with a slide switch that allows for continual operation over long periods.
Brushless Motor - Maintains constant speed under load and minimizes maintenance with an efficient brushless motor that doesn't require brush changes.
Durable Engineering - Helps block debris from entering internal components with mesh screens.
Ideal For Common Size Applications - Accommodates common regional market requirements with a 4 in. - 5 in. wheel acceptance.
QUICK-CHANGE Guard Removal - Quickly remove guard with tool-free change system.
disclaimers: DCG407B: ** - Per charge, using DCB205 battery and DW8062 cutting wheel (battery and cutting wheel sold separately).

rows.title: 20V MAX* 4.5 in. - 5 in. Variable Speed Grinder With FLEXVOLT ADVANTAGE Technology (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take advantage of more power with 20V MAX* tools featuring FLEXVOLT ADVANTAGE tool technology. This 20V MAX* 4.5 in. - 5 in. Variable Speed Grinder allows the user the to adjust wheel speed to match the needs of a variety of applications. This grinder delivers up to 48% more power** when paired with a DCB606 FLEXVOLT battery vs. DCB205 20V MAX* battery. As a part of the PERFORM & PROTECT lineup, this tool comes equipped with KICKBACK BRAKE and the E-CLUTCH System. This tool is a part of the expanding 20V MAX* system, and is compatible with all 20V MAX* batteries and chargers. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Variable speed functionality allows the user to adjust wheel speed for applications as needed
E-CLUTCH actives in less than a tenth of a second when a pinch/stall is detected, shutting down the motor

Kickback Brake engages when a pinch, stall, or bind-up event is sensed. The electronic brake engages with maximum force to quickly stop the wheel, reduce the movement of the grinder, and shut the grinder off
additional_features: Brake engages when trigger is released stopping the wheel quickly.
Tool Connect Chip Ready: Chip pocket accepts Tool Connect Chip DCE042 and connects with Tool Connect Site Manager app for easy asset management on the jobsite. (DCE042 sold separately)
Wireless Tool Control System - Wireless ON/OFF capability when paired with a compatible DEWALT dust extractor (sold separately) via Wireless Tool Control System
includes: (1) 20V MAX* 4.5 in. - 5 in. Variable Speed Grinder
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
** DCG409VSB using a DCB606 FLEXVOLT(R) battery vs. DCB205 DEWALT 20V MAX* battery (batteries sold separately)

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 4-1/2 in. Paddle Switch Small Angle Grinder With KICKBACK BRAKE (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on challenging grinding applications with the 20V MAX* XR 4.5 in. Paddle Switch Small Angle Grinder with KICKBACK BRAKE. E-SWITCH PROTECTION helps provide protection in event of a power outage or other unexpected shut down. Featuring a powerful brushless motor, this grinder is a part of the expansive 20V MAX* system. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Brushless motor requires no brush changes.
Brake stops wheel in 2 seconds or less on average

Kickback Brake engages when a pinch, stall, or bind-up event is sensed and the electronic brake engages with maximum force to quickly stop the wheel, reduce the movement of the grinder and shut the grinder off.
additional_features: Features E-Switch Protection - When the ON/OFF trigger switch has a no-volt release function. In the event of a power outage or other unexpected shut down, the trigger switch will need to be cycled (turned off and then on) to restart tool.
Two stage trigger requires two actions to activate tool.
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 4-1/2 in. Paddle Switch Small Angle Grinder Kit with DEWALT POWERSTACK 5Ah Battery
rows.description: Complete a wide range of grinding applications with the 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 4-1/2 in. Paddle Switch Small Angle Grinder. This grinder features a KICKBACK BREAK that engages to stop the wheel when a pinch, stall, or bind-up occurs. This kit includes our most powerful battery in its class**, the 20V MAX* DEWALT POWERSTACK 5Ah battery utilizing revolutionary pouch cell technology to deliver 50% more power†, 50% more work per charge†, and 2X the lifespan†.
features: Brushless motor for efficient performance and runtime
Cuts up to 20% Faster¹
Cuts up to 65% more rebar than the leading competitor^2
additional_features: E-switch protection when the on/off trigger switch has a no-volt release function. in the event of a power outage or other unexpected shut down, the trigger switch will need to be cycled (turned off and then on) to restart the tool

Kickback brake engages when a pinch, stall, or bind-up event is sensed and the electronic brake engages with maximum force to quickly stop the wheel, reduce the movment of the grinder and shut the grinder off
Two stage trigger requires two actions to activate tool
BRAKE stops wheel in 2 seconds or less on average
More efficient- battery is 50% more efficient making it DEWALT's most efficient battery in its class**
Durable design: battery has non-marring over-molded rubber base also helps to protect finished surfaces
Long-lasting: 2x lifespan† provides more overall investment value
At-a-glance-charge-status: quickly check state-of-charge on your battery with 3-led fuel gauge
includes: (1) DCG413 20V MAX* XR Brushless 4-1/2 in. Small Angle Grinder
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

†Regarding 50% more power: vs. DEWALT DCB205 battery; not in application. Regarding 50% more work per charge: usable energy vs. DEWALT DCB205 battery; not in application. Regarding 2x lifespan: charge cycles vs. DEWALT DCB205 battery.

**Regarding our most powerful battery in its class: vs. DEWALT XR batteries 5Ah or less; not in application. Regarding most efficient: usable energy vs. DEWALT XR Batteries 5Ah or less; not in application. Regarding Longest Lifespan: Charge cycles vs. DEWALT XR Batteries 5Ah or less
¹DCG413 & DCBP520 vs DCG413 & DCBP205 cutting 1/2 in. (#4) rebar.
^2DCG413 with DEWALT DCBP520 battery vs. leading competitor cutting 1/2 in. rebar.

rows.title: 60V MAX* 7 in. - 9 in. Large Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
rows.description: The 60V MAX* 7-9 in. Large Angle Grinder, DEWALT's first cordless Large Angle Grinder, delivers immense power at more than 3,000 MWO with a brushless motor. Built with user protection top of mind, a Kickback Brake brings the wheel to a halt for full stoppage when a kickback is detected, while the E-CLUTCH System immediately shuts down the motor when a pinch or stall is sensed. In addition, the Grinder is equipped with a No-Volt switch that prevents the tool from restarting following a loss of power. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 3,000 MWO Brushless Motor - Brushless motor producing 3,000 MWO delivers incredible power for extreme applications
Kickback Brake - Kickback brake engages when a pinch, stall, or bind-up event is sensed

Help Maximize Control - Equipped with the DEWALT ANTI-ROTATION System. This feature quickly stops the wheel when a pinch, stall, or bind-up event is sensed, reducing reactionary torque. The switch needs to be cycled (turned on and off) to restart the tool.
additional_features: WTC - Wireless Tool Control enables connectivity to WTC enabled Vacuums
TOOL CONNECT+ Technology - Delivers fully integrated connectivity with the DEWALT TOOL CONNECT app‡, providing users with data on asset management, tool location, utilization, and safety†.
No-Volt - Mitigates unexpected tool startups following loss of power
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 60 volts. Nominal voltage is 54.
†DEWALT PERFORM & PROTECT tools enabled with TOOL CONNECT+
